message: docs: update README.md to include installation note for Windows users, specifying the use of Git Bash or WSL for running the installer.

files.patch: @@ -27,6 +27,8 @@ curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scan | bash -s -- --easy-mode ``` +Note: Windows users must run the installer one-liner from within Git Bash, or use WSL for Windows. + ## 💥 **The Problem: AI Moves Fast, Bugs Move Faster**
